query:
SELECT s1.customerExternalId, s1.externalId AS sasboss_id, s2.externalId AS real_id, s2.supplierName AS real_supplier, s2.monthlyCost AS real_cost
FROM services s1
JOIN services s2 ON s2.customerExternalId = s1.customerExternalId AND s2.supplierName != 'SasBoss' AND s2.serviceType = 'Internet'
WHERE s1.supplierName = 'SasBoss' AND s1.serviceType = 'Internet'
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute 
SELECT s1.customerExternalId, s1.externalId AS sasboss_id, s2.externalId AS real_id, s2.supplierName AS real_supplier, s2.monthlyCost AS real_cost
FROM services s1
JOIN services s2 ON s2.customerExternalId = s1.customerExternalId AND s2.supplierName != 'SasBoss' AND s2.serviceType = 'Internet'
WHERE s1.supplierName = 'SasBoss' AND s1.serviceType = 'Internet'
LIMIT 10;
